testcase.name: test_fetch_gists

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'coroutine' has no len()

testcase.name: test_fetch_gist_content
test_save_gist_files

failure.message: AssertionError: expected call not found. Expected: open(PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/files/file1.py'), 'w') Actual: not called.

testcase.failure:
mock_fetch_content = <AsyncMock name='fetch_gist_content' id='4393607056'> mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4393612560'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open) @patch("scripts.utils.fetch_gist_content") def test_save_gist_files(mock_fetch_content, mock_file): mock_fetch_content.return_value = "print('Hello, world!')" save_gist_files(example_gist) > mock_file.assert_called_with(Path("gists/20240617-file1-gist/files/file1.py"), "w")
tests/test_utils.py:70: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <MagicMock name='open' id='4393612560'> args = (PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/files/file1.py'), 'w'), kwargs = {} expected = "open(PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/files/file1.py'), 'w')" actual = 'not called.' error_message = "expected call not found.\nExpected: open(PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/files/file1.py'), 'w')\nActual: not called."
def assert_called_with(self, /, *args, **kwargs): """assert that the last call was made with the specified arguments.
Raises an AssertionError if the args and keyword args passed in are different to the last call to the mock.""" if self.call_args is None: expected = self._format_mock_call_signature(args, kwargs) actual = 'not called.' error_message = ('expected call not found.\nExpected: %s\nActual: %s' % (expected, actual)) > raise AssertionError(error_message) E AssertionError: expected call not found. E Expected: open(PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/files/file1.py'), 'w') E Actual: not called.
/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/unittest/mock.py:930: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_create_gist_index

failure.message: AssertionError: expected call not found. Expected: open(PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/index.md'), 'w') Actual: not called.

testcase.failure:
mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4393555280'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open) def test_create_gist_index(mock_file): create_gist_index(example_gist) > mock_file.assert_called_with(Path("gists/20240617-file1-gist/index.md"), "w")

def assert_called_with(self, /, *args, **kwargs): """assert that the last call was made with the specified arguments.
Raises an AssertionError if the args and keyword args passed in are different to the last call to the mock.""" if self.call_args is None: expected = self._format_mock_call_signature(args, kwargs) actual = 'not called.' error_message = ('expected call not found.\nExpected: %s\nActual: %s' % (expected, actual)) > raise AssertionError(error_message) E AssertionError: expected call not found. E Expected: open(PosixPath('gists/20240617-file1-gist/index.md'), 'w') E Actual: not called.

testcase.name: test_update_readme

failure.message: AssertionError: expected call not found. Expected: open(PosixPath('README.md'), 'w') Actual: not called.

testcase.failure:
mock_file = <MagicMock name='open' id='4392243152'>
@patch("builtins.open", new_callable=mock_open) def test_update_readme(mock_file): update_readme([example_gist]) > mock_file.assert_called_with(Path("README.md"), "w")
tests/test_utils.py:86: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <MagicMock name='open' id='4392243152'> args = (PosixPath('README.md'), 'w'), kwargs = {} expected = "open(PosixPath('README.md'), 'w')", actual = 'not called.' error_message = "expected call not found.\nExpected: open(PosixPath('README.md'), 'w')\nActual: not called."
def assert_called_with(self, /, *args, **kwargs): """assert that the last call was made with the specified arguments.
Raises an AssertionError if the args and keyword args passed in are different to the last call to the mock.""" if self.call_args is None: expected = self._format_mock_call_signature(args, kwargs) actual = 'not called.' error_message = ('expected call not found.\nExpected: %s\nActual: %s' % (expected, actual)) > raise AssertionError(error_message) E AssertionError: expected call not found. E Expected: open(PosixPath('README.md'), 'w') E Actual: not called.
/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/unittest/mock.py:930: AssertionError
